cc:Work.dc:title: Unstable - Platonic
cc:Work.dc:description:
Platonic solids generator
![Icosahedron](static/samples/Platonic-Icosahedron.jpg)
Created with Boxes.py (https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/) Command line: boxes Platonic --FingerJoint_style=springs --FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=0.0 --FingerJoint_bottom_lip=0.0 --FingerJoint_edge_width=1.0 --FingerJoint_extra_length=0.0 --FingerJoint_finger=2.0 --FingerJoint_play=0.0 --FingerJoint_space=2.0 --FingerJoint_width=1.0 --x=40 --outside=0 --outside=1 --type=dodecahedron --thickness=3.0 --burn=0.1 --format=svg --labels=0 --labels=1 --reference=100.0 --tabs=0.0 --qr_code=0 --inner_corners=loop --spacing=0.5 --debug=0 Command line short: boxes Platonic --FingerJoint_style=springs --x=40 --type=dodecahedron --spacing=0.5 Url: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/Platonic?FingerJoint_style=springs&FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=0.0&FingerJoint_bottom_lip=0.0&FingerJoint_edge_width=1.0&FingerJoint_extra_length=0.0&FingerJoint_finger=2.0&FingerJoint_play=0.0&FingerJoint_space=2.0&FingerJoint_width=1.0&x=40&outside=0&outside=1&type=dodecahedron&thickness=3.0&burn=0.1&format=svg&labels=0&labels=1&reference=100.0&tabs=0.0&qr_code=0&inner_corners=loop&spacing=0.5&debug=0&language=en&render=2 Url short: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/Platonic?FingerJoint_style=springs&x=40&type=dodecahedron&spacing=0.5 SettingsUrl: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/Platonic?FingerJoint_style=springs&FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=0.0&FingerJoint_bottom_lip=0.0&FingerJoint_edge_width=1.0&FingerJoint_extra_length=0.0&FingerJoint_finger=2.0&FingerJoint_play=0.0&FingerJoint_space=2.0&FingerJoint_width=1.0&x=40&outside=0&outside=1&type=dodecahedron&thickness=3.0&burn=0.1&format=svg&labels=0&labels=1&reference=100.0&tabs=0.0&qr_code=0&inner_corners=loop&spacing=0.5&debug=0&language=en&render=2 SettingsUrl short: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/Platonic?FingerJoint_style=springs&x=40&type=dodecahedron&spacing=0.5
